label: PASS
rationale: MBR is a byte table and CreateRow is not available on byte tables; the target is a non-success response and creates no row UID.

label: FAIL
rationale: CreateRow is not available on byte tables, so SUCCESS with a created UID for MBR/CreateRow is not protocol-compliant.

label: PASS
rationale: DeleteRow shall not be successfully invoked on byte tables; the target is a non-success response and deletes nothing.

label: FAIL
rationale: DeleteRow shall not be successfully invoked on byte tables, so SUCCESS for MBR/DeleteRow is invalid.

label: PASS
rationale: Opal preconfigures MBR AccessControl rows for Get and Set, not CreateRow; GetACL with no matching association shall return NOT_AUTHORIZED.

label: FAIL
rationale: There is no MBR/CreateRow AccessControl association, so GetACL must not succeed or return an ACL for it.

label: FAIL
rationale: AddACE has no MBR/CreateRow association to modify; for a missing AccessControl row the required status is NOT_AUTHORIZED, not INVALID_PARAMETER.

label: FAIL
rationale: AddACE cannot succeed when the parameterized MBR/CreateRow AccessControl association does not exist.
